hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s.*(main|master|develop)\b' && echo 'BLOCKED: Direct push to protected branch (main/develop). Use a feature branch + PR.' && exit 2 || exit 0

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^pip\s+install|^pip3\s+install|\spip\s+install|\spip3\s+install' && echo 'BLOCKED: Use uv instead of pip. Run: uv add <package> or uv pip install <package>' && exit 2 || exit 0
[[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]] && uvx ruff check --fix --unfixable F401 "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && uvx ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" || true
jq -r '[.tool_name, (.tool_input.description // "unknown")] | @tsv' | { read tool desc; echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)	Agent	$desc" >> ~/.claude/audit.log; }
osascript -e 'display notification "Task complete" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
